examples: The house has stabling for 20 horses.
A new method of amplitude stabling for nanosecond laser pulse was proposed based on Pockels effect.
That evening, as he walked by the docks, a slip of a boy came up and asked where he was stabling his horse.
Monthly fees amounting to roughly half the expense of stabling, feeding and caring for a horse are attracting the same folk who are sought after for time-share properties.
